meta.label: WhatsApp Cloud API
meta.fix: Meta Developer Console → Your App → WhatsApp → API Setup → Generate token

meta.label: WhatsApp Webhook URL
meta.detail: WA_VERIFY_TOKEN not set — webhook verification will fail
meta.fix: Set WA_VERIFY_TOKEN and register webhook in Meta → App → WhatsApp → Webhooks

meta.label: Facebook Login
meta.fix: Create app at developers.facebook.com → Add Facebook Login product → copy App ID + Secret

meta.label: Facebook Pages API
meta.fix: In Meta Business Suite → Page → Professional Dashboard → Page Access Token

meta.label: Instagram Graph API
meta.fix: developers.facebook.com → Instagram Basic Display → Generate Token

meta.label: Instagram Business Account
meta.fix: In Meta Business Manager → Instagram → Account ID

meta.label: Threads API
meta.detail: THREADS_ACCESS_TOKEN not set — Threads is in Limited Access; distribution engine queues it as a channel
meta.fix: Apply for access at developers.facebook.com/docs/threads
meta.note: Status: Limited Access (Meta). distributionEngine.cjs supports this channel.

google.label: Google OAuth 2.0
google.detail: Missing: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
google.fix: console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials → Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID

google.label: Gmail API
google.detail: GMAIL_API_KEY not set — toolExecutionLayer gmail tool requires it
google.fix: Google Cloud Console → Library → Gmail API → Enable → Credentials → API Key

google.label: Google Drive API
google.detail: GDRIVE_API_KEY not set — toolExecutionLayer gdrive tool requires it
google.fix: Google Cloud Console → Library → Drive API → Enable → Credentials → API Key

google.label: Google Calendar API
google.detail: Not configured
google.fix: Enable Calendar API in Google Cloud Console → add https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar scope to OAuth

google.label: Google Docs API
google.detail: Not configured
google.fix: Enable Docs API in Google Cloud Console; use shared Google OAuth credentials

google.label: Google Meet
google.detail: Google Meet is provisioned via Calendar API (conferenceData). No separate credentials needed.
google.fix: Enable Calendar API and add conferenceDataVersion=1 to event creation requests
google.note: No standalone API — uses Calendar conferencing scope.

google.label: YouTube Data API
google.detail: YOUTUBE_API_KEY not set — distributionEngine references YouTube as a distribution channel
google.fix: Google Cloud Console → Library → YouTube Data API v3 → Enable → API Key

google.label: Google Maps API
google.detail: Not referenced in current codebase
google.fix: Enable Maps JavaScript API + Geocoding API if location features are added

microsoft.label: Azure AD OAuth 2.0
microsoft.fix: portal.azure.com → Azure Active Directory → App registrations → New registration

microsoft.label: Microsoft Graph API
microsoft.detail: MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID not set — Graph API unavailable
microsoft.fix: Exchange OAuth token for Graph access: POST /token → scope=https://graph.microsoft.com/.default

microsoft.label: Microsoft Outlook
microsoft.detail: Requires Azure OAuth — set MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID + SECRET
microsoft.fix: Add Mail.Read + Mail.Send to Azure App scopes; use Graph /me/messages endpoint

microsoft.label: Microsoft OneDrive
microsoft.detail: Requires Azure OAuth — set MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID + SECRET
microsoft.fix: Add Files.ReadWrite to Azure App scopes; use Graph /me/drive/root/children

microsoft.label: Microsoft Teams
microsoft.fix: For alerts: Teams Channel → Connectors → Incoming Webhook; For full API: Azure App + Teams scopes

git.label: GitHub PAT
git.detail: GITHUB_TOKEN not set — gitHubEngineeringAgent.cjs and toolExecutionLayer require this for writes
git.fix: github.com → Settings → Developer Settings → Personal Access Tokens → Generate (repo + read:user scopes)

git.label: GitHub OAuth App
git.fix: github.com → Settings → Developer Settings → OAuth Apps → New OAuth App

git.label: GitHub App
git.detail: Not configured — GitHub App required for org-level automation (PR reviews, webhooks)
git.fix: github.com → Settings → Developer Settings → GitHub Apps → New App

git.label: GitLab
git.detail: GITLAB_TOKEN not set — no GitLab integration exists in codebase yet
git.fix: gitlab.com → User Settings → Access Tokens → Add token (read_api + read_repository)

git.label: Bitbucket
git.detail: BITBUCKET_USER and BITBUCKET_TOKEN not set — no Bitbucket integration in codebase yet
git.fix: bitbucket.org → Personal Settings → App Passwords → Create (Repositories: Read)

productivity.label: Notion
productivity.detail: NOTION_TOKEN not set — toolExecutionLayer Notion tool requires it
productivity.fix: notion.so/my-integrations → New integration → copy Internal Integration Token

productivity.label: Slack
productivity.detail: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN not set — toolExecutionLayer Slack tool requires it
productivity.fix: api.slack.com/apps → Create App → Bot Token Scopes → Install → copy Bot User OAuth Token

productivity.label: Discord
productivity.detail: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL not set — distributionEngine uses Discord as a community channel
productivity.fix: discord.com/developers/applications → New Application → Bot → Token

productivity.label: Trello
productivity.detail: TRELLO_API_KEY and TRELLO_TOKEN not set — no Trello integration in codebase
productivity.fix: trello.com/app-key → copy API Key; authorize token at trello.com/1/authorize

productivity.label: Jira
productivity.detail: Missing: JIRA_URL, JIRA_EMAIL, JIRA_API_TOKEN
productivity.fix: id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens → Create token; JIRA_URL = https://yourcompany.atlassian.net

productivity.label: Asana
productivity.detail: ASANA_ACCESS_TOKEN not set — no Asana integration in codebase
productivity.fix: app.asana.com/0/my-apps → Create new token (Personal Access Token)

productivity.label: ClickUp
productivity.detail: CLICKUP_API_TOKEN not set — no ClickUp integration in codebase
productivity.fix: app.clickup.com/settings/apps → API Token → Generate

design.label: Figma
design.detail: FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN not set — browserMarketplace has figma_export automation; Figma API for file inspection not wired
design.fix: figma.com → Account Settings (bottom-left) → Personal Access Tokens → Create token

design.label: Canva
design.detail: Not integrated in current codebase — no Canva API service found
design.fix: To add Canva: register at canva.com/developers → Connect Apps → Create Integration
design.note: Canva API requires app approval. Implement via Design Autofill API or Content API.

commerce.label: Shopify
commerce.detail: Missing: SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN, SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN — browserMarketplace has shopify_add_product automation but no Shopify API service is wired
commerce.fix: Shopify Partners → Create app → Admin API access token; or Shopify Admin → Apps → Develop apps

commerce.label: WooCommerce
commerce.detail: Missing: WOOCOMMERCE_URL, WOOCOMMERCE_KEY, WOOCOMMERCE_SECRET — no WooCommerce integration in codebase
commerce.fix: WooCommerce Admin → Settings → Advanced → REST API → Add Key

automation.label: Zapier
automation.detail: ZAPIER_WEBHOOK_URL not set — Zapier triggers by calling Ooplix webhook endpoints; no inbound API call needed
automation.fix: In Zapier → Create Zap → Trigger = Webhooks → Catch Hook → use that URL as ZAPIER_WEBHOOK_URL
automation.note: Zapier integration model: Zapier calls Ooplix (inbound webhook). Set ZAPIER_WEBHOOK_URL if Ooplix should call Zapier.

automation.label: Make (Integromat)
automation.detail: Not configured — Make integrates via webhooks; same model as Zapier
automation.fix: make.com → Create Scenario → HTTP → Webhook → copy URL as MAKE_WEBHOOK_URL
automation.note: Make integration model: webhook-based. No dedicated Make API service in codebase.

automation.label: n8n
automation.detail: N8N_HOST and N8N_API_KEY not set — n8n can call Ooplix via webhooks without credentials
automation.fix: For self-hosted n8n: set N8N_HOST=https://n8n.yourdomain.com + N8N_API_KEY from n8n Settings → API

missing.label: WhatsApp Cloud API
missing.detail: Missing: WA_TOKEN (or WHATSAPP_TOKEN), WA_PHONE_ID (or PHONE_NUMBER_ID)
missing.fix: Meta Developer Console → Your App → WhatsApp → API Setup → Generate token

missing.label: WhatsApp Webhook URL
missing.detail: WA_VERIFY_TOKEN not set — webhook verification will fail
missing.fix: Set WA_VERIFY_TOKEN and register webhook in Meta → App → WhatsApp → Webhooks

missing.label: Facebook Login
missing.detail: FACEBOOK_APP_ID and FACEBOOK_APP_SECRET not set
missing.fix: Create app at developers.facebook.com → Add Facebook Login product → copy App ID + Secret

missing.fix: In Meta Business Suite → Page → Professional Dashboard → Page Access Token

missing.detail: INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN or INSTAGRAM_USER_ID not set
missing.fix: developers.facebook.com → Instagram Basic Display → Generate Token

missing.fix: In Meta Business Manager → Instagram → Account ID

all.desc: WhatsApp Cloud API bearer token (also WHATSAPP_TOKEN)
Instagram Business Account ID (Meta Business Manager)
Threads API access token (Limited Access beta)
Google OAuth 2.0 client ID (shared for all Google APIs)
Google Drive API key (toolExecutionLayer gdrive tool)
Google Maps API key (not currently referenced)
Azure AD app client ID (OAuth + all Microsoft APIs)
GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) — repo + read:user

missing.desc: WhatsApp Cloud API bearer token (also WHATSAPP_TOKEN)
Instagram Business Account ID (Meta Business Manager)
Threads API access token (Limited Access beta)
Google OAuth 2.0 client ID (shared for all Google APIs)
Google Drive API key (toolExecutionLayer gdrive tool)
Google Maps API key (not currently referenced)
Azure AD app client ID (OAuth + all Microsoft APIs)
GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) — repo + read:user

missing.detail: MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID not set — Graph API unavailable
missing.fix: Exchange OAuth token for Graph access: POST /token → scope=https://graph.microsoft.com/.default

missing.label: Microsoft Outlook
missing.detail: Requires Azure OAuth — set MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID + SECRET
missing.fix: Add Mail.Read + Mail.Send to Azure App scopes; use Graph /me/messages endpoint

missing.label: Microsoft OneDrive
missing.detail: Requires Azure OAuth — set MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID + SECRET
missing.fix: Add Files.ReadWrite to Azure App scopes; use Graph /me/drive/root/children

missing.label: Microsoft Teams
missing.detail: Not configured
missing.fix: For alerts: Teams Channel → Connectors → Incoming Webhook; For full API: Azure App + Teams scopes

missing.label: GitHub PAT
missing.detail: GITHUB_TOKEN not set — gitHubEngineeringAgent.cjs and toolExecutionLayer require this for writes
missing.fix: github.com → Settings → Developer Settings → Personal Access Tokens → Generate (repo + read:user scopes)

missing.label: GitHub OAuth App
missing.detail: Missing: GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET
missing.fix: github.com → Settings → Developer Settings → OAuth Apps → New OAuth App

missing.label: GitLab
missing.detail: GITLAB_TOKEN not set — no GitLab integration exists in codebase yet
missing.fix: gitlab.com → User Settings → Access Tokens → Add token (read_api + read_repository)

missing.label: Bitbucket
missing.detail: BITBUCKET_USER and BITBUCKET_TOKEN not set — no Bitbucket integration in codebase yet
missing.fix: bitbucket.org → Personal Settings → App Passwords → Create (Repositories: Read)

missing.label: Notion
missing.detail: NOTION_TOKEN not set — toolExecutionLayer Notion tool requires it
missing.fix: notion.so/my-integrations → New integration → copy Internal Integration Token

missing.label: Slack
missing.detail: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN not set — toolExecutionLayer Slack tool requires it
missing.fix: api.slack.com/apps → Create App → Bot Token Scopes → Install → copy Bot User OAuth Token

missing.label: Discord
missing.detail: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL not set — distributionEngine uses Discord as a community channel
missing.fix: discord.com/developers/applications → New Application → Bot → Token

missing.label: Trello
missing.detail: TRELLO_API_KEY and TRELLO_TOKEN not set — no Trello integration in codebase
missing.fix: trello.com/app-key → copy API Key; authorize token at trello.com/1/authorize

missing.label: Jira
missing.detail: Missing: JIRA_URL, JIRA_EMAIL, JIRA_API_TOKEN
missing.fix: id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens → Create token; JIRA_URL = https://yourcompany.atlassian.net

missing.label: Asana
missing.detail: ASANA_ACCESS_TOKEN not set — no Asana integration in codebase
missing.fix: app.asana.com/0/my-apps → Create new token (Personal Access Token)

missing.label: ClickUp
missing.detail: CLICKUP_API_TOKEN not set — no ClickUp integration in codebase
missing.fix: app.clickup.com/settings/apps → API Token → Generate

missing.label: Figma
missing.detail: FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN not set — browserMarketplace has figma_export automation; Figma API for file inspection not wired
missing.fix: figma.com → Account Settings (bottom-left) → Personal Access Tokens → Create token

missing.label: Shopify
missing.detail: Missing: SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN, SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN — browserMarketplace has shopify_add_product automation but no Shopify API service is wired
missing.fix: Shopify Partners → Create app → Admin API access token; or Shopify Admin → Apps → Develop apps

missing.label: WooCommerce
missing.detail: Missing: WOOCOMMERCE_URL, WOOCOMMERCE_KEY, WOOCOMMERCE_SECRET — no WooCommerce integration in codebase
missing.fix: WooCommerce Admin → Settings → Advanced → REST API → Add Key

optional.label: Threads API
optional.detail: THREADS_ACCESS_TOKEN not set — Threads is in Limited Access; distribution engine queues it as a channel
optional.fix: Apply for access at developers.facebook.com/docs/threads
optional.note: Status: Limited Access (Meta). distributionEngine.cjs supports this channel.

optional.label: Google Meet
optional.detail: Google Meet is provisioned via Calendar API (conferenceData). No separate credentials needed.
optional.fix: Enable Calendar API and add conferenceDataVersion=1 to event creation requests
optional.note: No standalone API — uses Calendar conferencing scope.

optional.label: Google Maps API
optional.detail: Not referenced in current codebase
optional.fix: Enable Maps JavaScript API + Geocoding API if location features are added

optional.label: GitHub App
optional.detail: Not configured — GitHub App required for org-level automation (PR reviews, webhooks)
optional.fix: github.com → Settings → Developer Settings → GitHub Apps → New App

optional.label: Canva
optional.detail: Not integrated in current codebase — no Canva API service found
optional.fix: To add Canva: register at canva.com/developers → Connect Apps → Create Integration
optional.note: Canva API requires app approval. Implement via Design Autofill API or Content API.

optional.label: Zapier
optional.detail: ZAPIER_WEBHOOK_URL not set — Zapier triggers by calling Ooplix webhook endpoints; no inbound API call needed
optional.fix: In Zapier → Create Zap → Trigger = Webhooks → Catch Hook → use that URL as ZAPIER_WEBHOOK_URL
optional.note: Zapier integration model: Zapier calls Ooplix (inbound webhook). Set ZAPIER_WEBHOOK_URL if Ooplix should call Zapier.

optional.label: Make (Integromat)
optional.detail: Not configured — Make integrates via webhooks; same model as Zapier
optional.fix: make.com → Create Scenario → HTTP → Webhook → copy URL as MAKE_WEBHOOK_URL
optional.note: Make integration model: webhook-based. No dedicated Make API service in codebase.

optional.label: n8n
optional.detail: N8N_HOST and N8N_API_KEY not set — n8n can call Ooplix via webhooks without credentials
optional.fix: For self-hosted n8n: set N8N_HOST=https://n8n.yourdomain.com + N8N_API_KEY from n8n Settings → API

all.desc: WhatsApp Cloud API bearer token (also WHATSAPP_TOKEN)
Instagram Business Account ID (Meta Business Manager)
Threads API access token (Limited Access beta)
Google OAuth 2.0 client ID (shared for all Google APIs)
Google Drive API key (toolExecutionLayer gdrive tool)
Google Maps API key (not currently referenced)
Azure AD app client ID (OAuth + all Microsoft APIs)
GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) — repo + read:user

missing.desc: WhatsApp Cloud API bearer token (also WHATSAPP_TOKEN)
Instagram Business Account ID (Meta Business Manager)
Threads API access token (Limited Access beta)
Google OAuth 2.0 client ID (shared for all Google APIs)
Google Drive API key (toolExecutionLayer gdrive tool)
Google Maps API key (not currently referenced)
Azure AD app client ID (OAuth + all Microsoft APIs)
GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) — repo + read:user

meta.label: WhatsApp Cloud API
meta.fix: Meta Developer Console → Your App → WhatsApp → API Setup → Generate token

meta.label: WhatsApp Webhook URL
meta.detail: WA_VERIFY_TOKEN not set — webhook verification will fail
meta.fix: Set WA_VERIFY_TOKEN and register webhook in Meta → App → WhatsApp → Webhooks

meta.label: Facebook Login
meta.fix: Create app at developers.facebook.com → Add Facebook Login product → copy App ID + Secret

meta.label: Facebook Pages API
meta.fix: In Meta Business Suite → Page → Professional Dashboard → Page Access Token

meta.label: Instagram Graph API
meta.fix: developers.facebook.com → Instagram Basic Display → Generate Token

meta.label: Instagram Business Account
meta.fix: In Meta Business Manager → Instagram → Account ID

meta.label: Threads API
meta.detail: THREADS_ACCESS_TOKEN not set — Threads is in Limited Access; distribution engine queues it as a channel
meta.fix: Apply for access at developers.facebook.com/docs/threads
meta.note: Status: Limited Access (Meta). distributionEngine.cjs supports this channel.

google.label: Google OAuth 2.0
google.detail: Missing: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
google.fix: console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials → Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID

google.label: Gmail API
google.detail: GMAIL_API_KEY not set — toolExecutionLayer gmail tool requires it
google.fix: Google Cloud Console → Library → Gmail API → Enable → Credentials → API Key

google.label: Google Drive API
google.detail: GDRIVE_API_KEY not set — toolExecutionLayer gdrive tool requires it
google.fix: Google Cloud Console → Library → Drive API → Enable → Credentials → API Key

google.label: Google Calendar API
google.detail: Not configured
google.fix: Enable Calendar API in Google Cloud Console → add https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar scope to OAuth

google.label: Google Docs API
google.detail: Not configured
google.fix: Enable Docs API in Google Cloud Console; use shared Google OAuth credentials

google.label: Google Meet
google.detail: Google Meet is provisioned via Calendar API (conferenceData). No separate credentials needed.
google.fix: Enable Calendar API and add conferenceDataVersion=1 to event creation requests
google.note: No standalone API — uses Calendar conferencing scope.

google.label: YouTube Data API
google.detail: YOUTUBE_API_KEY not set — distributionEngine references YouTube as a distribution channel
google.fix: Google Cloud Console → Library → YouTube Data API v3 → Enable → API Key

google.label: Google Maps API
google.detail: Not referenced in current codebase
google.fix: Enable Maps JavaScript API + Geocoding API if location features are added

microsoft.label: Azure AD OAuth 2.0
microsoft.fix: portal.azure.com → Azure Active Directory → App registrations → New registration

microsoft.fix: Exchange OAuth token for Graph access: POST /token → scope=https://graph.microsoft.com/.default
